title: THE TWIDDLERS - 20 Christmas Suncatcher in Assorted Festive Designs - Paint Your Own DIY Ornament Bauble Decorations - Fun Gift, Toy Art Crafts Complete Set, Activity for Kids, Party Bag Fillers
features: 🎨Perfect Christmas Activity - Kids will love painting these suncatchers. Spoilt for choice and ensuring hours of fun, they'll be amazed by the final result, great as paint your own xmas decorations.

🎨Lots of Lovely Designs - Our 20 Christmas suncatcher kit feature many different designs - including Santa, Christmas trees, snowmen, presents, snowflakes, and more - make your own christmas decorations!

🎨Make your Christmas Colourful - Decorate your house with vibrant suncatchers this Christmas allowing the winter light to seep in and paint the walls with cheerful hues - the perfect DIY christmas decorations for kids.
🎨Complete DIY Kit - Included in our christmas crafts for kids set are 20 suncatchers ready to paint, 9 coloured paints of assorted colours, and a paintbrush.

🎨Satisfaction Guaranteed - We offer a 100% one-year warranty on all of our christmas activities for kids. If you have any queries about our christmas sun catchers, please don’t hesitate to contact us!
description: Product Description A collection of Christmassy homeware items bound to make you smile!
